basic_details.job_title: IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 1524 Trade / Technician Apprentice Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) has released the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification for engagement of apprentices across four refinery units - Bongaigaon Refinery (144 seats), Gujarat Refinery (647 seats), Mathura Refinery (151 seats), and Paradip Refinery (582 seats) - covering trades and disciplines including Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Secretarial Assistant, Accountant, and Data Entry Operator. Candidates aged 18 to 24 years as on 30 June 2026 can apply online from 29 June 2026 (10:00 hrs) to 28 July 2026 (17:00 hrs) through the official website www.i

application_fee.details: The IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification does not mention any application fee for any category. Candidates can apply online through the NAPS/NATS portals and the Microsoft Forms link without any fee payment.

age_limit.details: Candidates wondering about the age limit for the IOCL Apprentice 2026 can note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. Age will be verified only through the Matriculation (Class X) certificate issued by the Board of Secondary Education. Relaxations in the upper age limit are as follows: SC/ST candidates get 5 years, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years irrespective of category. | Category Maximum Age (as on 30.06.2026) UR / EWS 24 years OBC (NCL) 27 years SC / ST 29 years PwBD (General) 34 years PwBD (OBC-NCL) 37 years PwBD (SC/ST) 39 years

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: 3-year B.Sc. in Maths, Physics, Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry
Matriculation + ITI in Fitter Trade (minimum 2 years duration)
3-year B.Sc. in Maths, Physics, Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry
3-year Diploma in Chemical Engg./Petrochemical Engg./Chemical Technology/Refinery and Petrochemical Engg.
3-year Diploma in Electrical Engg. / Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engg.
3-year Diploma in Instrumentation Engg / Instrumentation & Electronics / Instrumentation & Control Engg / Applied Electronics and Instrumentation Engg.
Class XII pass (non-graduate fresher with no prior institutional/skill training)
Class XII pass + Skill Certificate in 'Domestic Data Entry Operator' (issued under NSQF, training less than 1 year)

qualification.details: The educational qualification required for the IndianOil Apprentice Recruitment 2026 varies by trade code, and all qualifications must be from a recognized Board/University/Institute completed as a regular full-time course. Candidates must have already passed the prescribed qualification as on 30 June 2026 - results awaited candidates are not eligible. Candidates holding BE/B.Tech, MBA, CA, LLB, MCA, or equivalent higher professional qualifications are not eligible. | Candidates wondering about the age limit for the IOCL Apprentice 2026 can note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. Age will be verified only through the Matriculation (Class X) certificate issued by the Board of Secondary Education. Relaxations in the upper age limit are as follows: SC/ST candidates get 5 years, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years irrespective of category. | Candidates must not have completed 5 years after acquiring the prescribed qualification as on 30 June 2026. Engineering Graduate or Diploma holder candidates who have 1 or more years of job experience after qualifying are not eligible. A candidate with B.Sc. (Physics, Maths, Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry) may apply for only one code among 101, 103, or 108. A candidate with B.Com may apply for only one code among 108 or 109. Candidates applying for more than one trade/discipline will be summarily rejected. PwBD candidates may apply only against identified seats under Codes 102, 105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, and 111.

salary_details.monthly stipend: As per Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and Corporation guidelines
salary_details.safety equipment (codes 101–107 for bgr/: One pair of safety shoes and helmet (returnable on completion)
salary_details.general leave: 32 days (8 days per quarter) including medical grounds
salary_details.details: The stipend for IOCL Apprentice 2026 will be paid as prescribed under the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and Apprentices Rules 1992 (as amended) along with Corporation's guidelines. The official notification does not mention a specific monthly stipend amount. Apprentices will not receive HRA or Company accommodation. They will, however, receive accident insurance coverage and safety equipment (safety shoes and helmet) for selected trades. | Candidates should also note that upon completion of the apprenticeship period, IOCL has no obligation to offer employment, and apprentices cannot claim employment rights on the basis of completion of training.

selection_process: There is no written test for the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Selection for all four refinery units is entirely merit-based

with the merit list prepared on the basis of aggregate percentage of marks in the prescribed qualifying examination. Candidates applying for apprenticeship training for the first time will be given preference over those applying for a second time.

Merit List Preparation: Candidates are ranked in descending order of percentage of marks in the prescribed qualification (aggregate of all years/semesters). Tie-breaking: In case of a tie in percentage
the candidate senior by age (earlier date of birth) is ranked higher. If date of birth is also the same

the candidate with a higher percentage in Matriculation is ranked higher. Shortlisting for Document Verification: Candidates are shortlisted based on merit and available seats. Tentative date of publication of shortlist is 05 August 2026. Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must appear in person with original documents. Tentatively scheduled from 11 August 2026 to 18 August 2026. Pre-Engagement Medical Examination: Candidates must pass a medical fitness test as prescribed under the Apprentices Act. Only candidates declared medically fit will proceed. Offer of Engagement: Candidates whose documents and medical fitness are found in order will receive a formal engagement offer.
how_to_apply: The application process for the IndianOil Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is a mandatory two-step online process. Both Step I (NAPS/NATS portal registration and application) and Step II (Microsoft Forms submission) must be completed; completing only one step will result in an invalid application. The application window is open from 29 June 2026 (10:00 hrs) to 28 July 2026 (17:00 hrs) at www.iocl.com.

For Codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, and 111: Register on the NAPS portal at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ and apply for the relevant IOCL refinery opportunity using the establishment ID for NAPS provided above.

For Codes 104, 105, 106, and 107: Register on the NATS portal at https://nats.education.gov.in and apply for the advertisement notified by the specific IOCL refinery unit on your dashboard using the establishment ID for NATS provided above.

After applying on NAPS/NATS, the candidate must mandatorily submit additional information through the Microsoft Forms link available on the IOCL website. Candidates should submit only one response. The Microsoft Forms links per unit are:
Visit www.iocl.com and go to the 'What's New' section.
Click on the relevant refinery unit's apprentice engagement notification link.
Ensure your profile is registered and 100% correctly updated on the relevant NAPS or NATS portal.
Log in to the NAPS/NATS portal using your User ID/Email ID and apply for the apprenticeship opportunity under the applicable refinery's Establishment ID.
After successfully applying on NAPS/NATS, go back to www.iocl.com and click on the Microsoft Forms link for your refinery unit.
Submit the additional information form with the same Enrolment No./Student ID/Registration No. used in Step I.
Ensure all details in both steps are identical and correct.

content_sections.heading: IOCL Apprentice 2026 Notification PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: The official IOCL Apprentice 2026 notification PDFs for all four refinery units are available at the official IOCL website www.iocl.com under the "What's New" section. Candidates should download the unit-specific notification they intend to apply for and read all eligibility conditions carefully before filling the application forms. The establishment IDs for NAPS and NATS portals are listed below unit-wise for reference.

content_sections.heading: IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – Quick Summary
content_sections.text: The IndianOil Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is a simultaneous notification issued by four IOCL refinery units on 29 June 2026 under the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973. The following table provides a unit-wise overview of the IOCL Refinery Apprentice Vacancy 2026.

content_sections.heading: IOCL Apprentice 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: All four IOCL refinery units share the same key dates for this IndianOil Apprentice Vacancy 2026. The online application opens on 29 June 2026 at 10:00 hrs and the last date to submit the application is 28 July 2026 at 17:00 hrs . The tentative date for publication of the list of candidates called for Document Verification is 05 August 2026 , and Document Verification is tentatively scheduled from 11 August to 18 August 2026 .

rows.event: Tentative Date of Publication of Shortlist for Document Verification

content_sections.heading: IOCL Apprentice Vacancy 2026 – Unit-wise & Trade-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The IOCL Apprentice Notification 2026 covers 11 trade/discipline codes across four refinery units, with vacancies varying significantly by unit. Candidates should apply only for the refinery unit they intend to join, and can apply for only one trade or discipline per unit. The seat numbers below are tentative and may increase or decrease at management's discretion.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria – IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The educational qualification required for the IndianOil Apprentice Recruitment 2026 varies by trade code, and all qualifications must be from a recognized Board/University/Institute completed as a regular full-time course . Candidates must have already passed the prescribed qualification as on 30 June 2026 - results awaited candidates are not eligible. Candidates holding BE/B.Tech, MBA, CA, LLB, MCA, or equivalent higher professional qualifications are not eligible. Candidates wondering about the age limit for the IOCL Apprentice 2026 can note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. Age will be verified only through the Matriculation (Class X) certificate issued by the Board of Secondary Education. Relaxations in the upper age limit are as follows: SC/ST candidates get 5 years, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years irrespective of category. Candidates must not have completed 5 years after acquiring the prescribed qualification as on 30 June 2026. Engineering Graduate or Diploma holder candidates who have 1 or more years of job experience after qualifying are not eligible. A candidate with B.Sc. (Physics, Maths, Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry) may apply for only one code among 101, 103, or 108. A candidate with B.Com may apply for only one code among 108 or 109. Candidates applying for more than one trade/discipline will be summarily rejected. PwBD candidates may apply only against identified seats under Codes 102, 105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, and 111.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee – IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification does not mention any application fee for any category. Candidates can apply online through the NAPS/NATS portals and the Microsoft Forms link without any fee payment.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – IndianOil Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: There is no written test for the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Selection for all four refinery units is entirely merit-based, with the merit list prepared on the basis of aggregate percentage of marks in the prescribed qualifying examination. Candidates applying for apprenticeship training for the first time will be given preference over those applying for a second time. Merit List Preparation: Candidates are ranked in descending order of percentage of marks in the prescribed qualification (aggregate of all years/semesters). Tie-breaking: In case of a tie in percentage, the candidate senior by age (earlier date of birth) is ranked higher. If date of birth is also the same, the candidate with a higher percentage in Matriculation is ranked higher. Shortlisting for Document Verification: Candidates are shortlisted based on merit and available seats. Tentative date of publication of shortlist is 05 August 2026 . Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must appear in person with original documents. Tentatively scheduled from 11 August 2026 to 18 August 2026 . Pre-Engagement Medical Examination: Candidates must pass a medical fitness test as prescribed under the Apprentices Act. Only candidates declared medically fit will proceed. Offer of Engagement: Candidates whose documents and medical fitness are found in order will receive a formal engagement offer.

content_sections.heading: IOCL Apprentice Stipend / Salary 2026
content_sections.text: The stipend for IOCL Apprentice 2026 will be paid as prescribed under the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and Apprentices Rules 1992 (as amended) along with Corporation's guidelines. The official notification does not mention a specific monthly stipend amount. Apprentices will not receive HRA or Company accommodation. They will, however, receive accident insurance coverage and safety equipment (safety shoes and helmet) for selected trades. Candidates should also note that upon completion of the apprenticeship period, IOCL has no obligation to offer employment , and apprentices cannot claim employment rights on the basis of completion of training.

rows.details: As per Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and Corporation guidelines

rows.details: One pair of safety shoes and helmet (returnable on completion)
32 days (8 days per quarter) including medical grounds

content_sections.heading: Documents Required at Document Verification – IOCL Apprentice 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates shortlisted for document verification in the IOCL Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2026 must bring originals and self-attested copies of all required documents. SC/ST/PwBD candidates will be reimbursed single second-class railway fare for attending document verification, provided the distance is not less than 30 km. 10th Pass/Matriculation certificate (as proof of date of birth). Class XII marksheet / ITI (Fitter) semester-wise/year-wise marksheets / Graduation / Diploma in Engineering marksheets. Class XII / Final ITI (Fitter) / Graduation / Diploma Certificate issued by the respective Board/Authority. CGPA/OGPA/Letter Grade to percentage conversion certificate from University/Institute, if applicable. Certificate from the Principal of the School/Polytechnic/College/Institute confirming the date of result publication and regular full-time mode of course completion, if applicable. SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/Disability certificate in the prescribed format as issued by the Competent Authority (available at www.iocl.com). For Code 111: Skill Certificate in 'Domestic Data Entry Operator' issued under NSQF or Central Govt. recognized authority. Print of NATS/NAPS portal registration with applicant details. Affidavit as per Annexure-A (for candidates applying for second-time apprenticeship). One original Photo ID proof - Aadhar Card / PAN Card / Voter ID / Driving License / Passport.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
content_sections.text: The application process for the IndianOil Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is a mandatory two-step online process. Both Step I (NAPS/NATS portal registration and application) and Step II (Microsoft Forms submission) must be completed; completing only one step will result in an invalid application. The application window is open from 29 June 2026 (10:00 hrs) to 28 July 2026 (17:00 hrs) at www.iocl.com . For Codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, and 111: Register on the NAPS portal at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ and apply for the relevant IOCL refinery opportunity using the establishment ID for NAPS provided above. After applying on NAPS/NATS, the candidate must mandatorily submit additional information through the Microsoft Forms link available on the IOCL website. Candidates should submit only one response. The Microsoft Forms links per unit are:

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid in IOCL Apprentice Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates make easily avoidable errors while applying for the IOCL Apprentice Vacancy 2026 that result in summary rejection. The following points are based on common patterns in similar PSU apprenticeship recruitment drives and are not derived from the official notification. Completing only Step I or only Step II: Both NAPS/NATS portal application and Microsoft Forms submission are mandatory. Completing only one will make the application invalid. Mismatched details across Step I and Step II: The Enrolment No., email ID, and mobile number used in NAPS/NATS must exactly match those submitted in the Microsoft Forms. Any mismatch leads to rejection. Applying for more than one trade/discipline: The notification explicitly states that candidates applying for more than one trade/discipline will be summarily rejected. Applying with qualifications acquired through distance/correspondence/part-time mode: Only regular full-time courses are eligible. Distance education qualifications are not accepted. Candidates with higher qualifications (BE/B.Tech/MBA/CA etc.) applying: Those possessing or having completed higher professional qualifications before joining are not eligible and will be rejected at document verification. Not converting CGPA to percentage before applying: Candidates with CGPA/Grade-based marksheets must mention the equivalent percentage as per their institute's norms and carry a conversion certificate to document verification. Waiting until the last minute: The portal closes at 17:00 hrs on 28 July 2026. Technical issues near the deadline are common - apply well in advance. Not updating NAPS/NATS profile to 100%: Incomplete profiles may cause the application to be treated as invalid. Always verify the profile before applying.

faq.question: Q1. Has IOCL officially released the Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, Indian Oil Corporation Limited has officially released the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification on 29 June 2026 for four refinery units — Bongaigaon (144 seats), Gujarat (647 seats), Mathura (151 seats), and Paradip (582 seats) — covering 11 trade and discipline codes.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for IOCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application (both NAPS/NATS and Microsoft Forms) for the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is 28 July 2026 at 17:00 hrs. The application window opens on 29 June 2026 at 10:00 hrs.

faq.question: Q3. Is there a written test for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no written test for the IOCL Apprentice 2026. Selection is based entirely on the percentage of marks obtained in the prescribed qualifying examination, with preference given to first-time apprenticeship applicants.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IOCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. SC/ST candidates get 5 years of relaxation, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years of upper age relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official IOCL Apprentice 2026 notification for any category. The application is free of cost for all candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates with BE/B.Tech degrees apply for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates possessing higher professional qualifications such as BE/B.Tech, MBA, CA, LLB, or MCA are not eligible to apply for the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Such candidates will be disqualified at the document verification stage.

faq.question: Q7. What are the two steps to complete the IOCL Apprentice 2026 application?
faq.answer: Step I is registering on the NAPS portal (for codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, 111) or NATS portal (for codes 104, 105, 106, 107) and applying for the relevant opportunity. Step II is submitting additional details through the Microsoft Forms link available at www.iocl.com. Both steps are mandatory and must match in all details.

faq.question: Q8. Will IOCL offer permanent employment after the apprenticeship is completed?
faq.answer: No. The official notification explicitly states that upon completion of the apprenticeship period, IOCL has no obligation to offer employment and apprentices cannot claim employment rights on the basis of apprenticeship completion.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed for IOCL Apprentice Document Verification 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring Class X certificate (for age proof), Class XII/ITI/Graduation/Diploma marksheets and certificates, category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD), NAPS/NATS portal registration printout, Affidavit (Annexure-A if applicable), and one original Photo ID proof (Aadhar/PAN/Voter ID/Driving License/Passport).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official IOCL Apprentice 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification for all four refinery units is available on the IOCL official website at www.iocl.com under the 'What's New' section. All corrigenda and updates will also be posted only on this website.

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Indian Oil Corporation Limited has officially released the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification on 29 June 2026 for four refinery units — Bongaigaon (144 seats), Gujarat (647 seats), Mathura (151 seats), and Paradip (582 seats) — covering 11 trade and discipline codes.

mainEntity.name: What is the last date to apply online for IOCL Apprentice 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The last date to submit the online application (both NAPS/NATS and Microsoft Forms) for the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is 28 July 2026 at 17:00 hrs. The application window opens on 29 June 2026 at 10:00 hrs.

mainEntity.name: Is there a written test for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. There is no written test for the IOCL Apprentice 2026. Selection is based entirely on the percentage of marks obtained in the prescribed qualifying examination, with preference given to first-time apprenticeship applicants.

mainEntity.name: What is the age limit for IOCL Apprentice 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. SC/ST candidates get 5 years of relaxation, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years of upper age relaxation.

mainEntity.name: What is the application fee for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: No application fee has been mentioned in the official IOCL Apprentice 2026 notification for any category. The application is free of cost for all candidates.

mainEntity.name: Can candidates with BE/B.Tech degrees apply for IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Candidates possessing higher professional qualifications such as BE/B.Tech, MBA, CA, LLB, or MCA are not eligible to apply for the IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Such candidates will be disqualified at the document verification stage.

mainEntity.name: What are the two steps to complete the IOCL Apprentice 2026 application?

acceptedAnswer.text: Step I is registering on the NAPS portal (for codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, 111) or NATS portal (for codes 104, 105, 106, 107) and applying for the relevant opportunity. Step II is submitting additional details through the Microsoft Forms link available at www.iocl.com. Both steps are mandatory and must match in all details.

mainEntity.name: Will IOCL offer permanent employment after the apprenticeship is completed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. The official notification explicitly states that upon completion of the apprenticeship period, IOCL has no obligation to offer employment and apprentices cannot claim employment rights on the basis of apprenticeship completion.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for IOCL Apprentice Document Verification 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: Candidates must bring Class X certificate (for age proof), Class XII/ITI/Graduation/Diploma marksheets and certificates, category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD), NAPS/NATS portal registration printout, Affidavit (Annexure-A if applicable), and one original Photo ID proof (Aadhar/PAN/Voter ID/Driving License/Passport).

mainEntity.name: Where can I find the official IOCL Apprentice 2026 notification?

acceptedAnswer.text: The official IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification for all four refinery units is available on the IOCL official website at www.iocl.com under the 'What's New' section. All corrigenda and updates will also be posted only on this website.
